scenarios.query: Review this ADR proposing we adopt Kafka for our event pipeline.
expected_behavior: Recognizes a decision-shaped review (an ADR), not a code diff
Loads reference/lenses/reviewing-decision-lifecycle/body.md and checks rationale, lock-in, exit, and revisit trigger
Pulls in the design-capable lenses relevant to the decision's domain (e.g. resilience/scalability, observability)

scenarios.query: Thorough review of this build-vs-buy RFC — use all relevant lenses.
expected_behavior: Recognizes comprehensive mode and runs every relevant decision/design lens uncapped
Reviews the choice and its record (alternatives, assumptions, rollback) rather than implementation code
Applies the comprehensive Nit-pinned floor and synthesizes one verdict

scenarios.query: Quick triage of this deprecation plan before we announce it.
expected_behavior: Recognizes triage mode and runs only the critical-tier decision concerns
Flags missing exit/rollback or migration-safety gaps via reference/lenses/reviewing-migration-and-data-safety/body.md
